text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ugh, this sucks... I can't believe I lost.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I guess that's what I get for trying to flex in front
of everyone. I legit thought I had it too. Welp.
Ahaha.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't worry 'bout me. I'll get over this real
quick and get right back to work.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I wanna win the next one. Like... badly.
choice_data_list: And through it all, I'll be right there with you!
And through it all, I'll be right there with you!
Is that how you really feel?
Is that how you really feel?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I wanna win the next one. Like... badly.
choice_data_list: And through it all, I'll be right there with you!
And through it all, I'll be right there with you!
Is that how you really feel?
Is that how you really feel?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, talk about reliable! I knew I could trust you
to be there for me. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
One-way streets aren't my thing, though, so I just
wanna make sure... Do you believe in me, too?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Like, are you absolutely convinced with 100% of
your heart and soul that I'll be able to win?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Good! Thanks for that! Heck yeah, My confidence is back!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'm so gonna win next time! Just you watch!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I've worked so hard all this time because I wanna win! I've been wanting to win ever since you chose me as your trainee!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, pause. Did I suddenly just get my groove
back, just like that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Aw man, you bamboozled me into getting fired
up! You're such a cheater!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe, but still, thanks. You wanna see me put
my money where my mouth is? All right, bet! I'll
show you what victory looks like next time!
